title: SQLITE_ERROR when resuming Wait node with incorrect URL
symptom: When attempting to resume a Wait node via a POST request, a 500 error occurs with 'SQLITE_ERROR: no such column: NaN'. This happens even with valid JSON payloads.
applies_when: Using Wait node in webhook mode
Sending POST request to resume the workflow
not_this_if: Execution ID and webhook ID are valid
root_cause: The error occurs because the URL used to resume the Wait node is incorrectly formatted, leading to an invalid execution ID being interpreted as 'NaN'. This happens when the URL contains an incorrect segment after 'webhook-waiting'.
fix_steps: Ensure the resume URL is correctly formatted as 'http://localhost:5678/webhook-waiting/{executionId}'
Remove any additional segments after 'webhook-waiting/' that are not valid execution IDs
Test the corrected URL with a valid execution ID
agent_instruction: Correct the resume URL format to avoid 'NaN' in the execution ID.
